arts.ttl: Marco Baroni Chooses Lazio Striker for Venezia Clash; Possible Surprise at the Back
arts.sum: Lazio coach Marco Baroni has reportedly decided who will fill in for the injured Taty Castellanos against Venezia. The Background The Biancocelesti will be looking to garner three points on the road when they take on the struggling Venetians on Saturday. However, they will have to negotiate the contest without their main striker who picked […] The post Marco Baroni Chooses Lazio Striker for Venezia Clash; Possible Surprise at the Back appeared first on The Laziali.
